project.name: BunnyChat
project.description: BunnyChat is an ASP.NET Core 8 web application (BunnyChat) with JWT authentication, MongoDB integration, and Swagger API documentation. The framework validates JWT tokens for issuer, expiration, audience, and signing authority.

nodes.name: ua-import-map-input.json
nodes.summary: Understand-Anything pipeline input manifest listing the project root and all 53 discovered source files with language, line count, and file-category metadata for import-map resolution.
nodes.languageNotes: Structured JSON manifest consumed by the import-map extraction script to enumerate scannable project files.

nodes.name: ua-import-map-output.json
nodes.summary: Resolved import map artifact produced by the Understand-Anything scanner, mapping each of 53 project files to internal import dependencies (currently empty across the BunnyChat codebase).
nodes.languageNotes: Output JSON with scriptCompleted flag, scan stats, and a per-file importMap object keyed by project-relative paths.

nodes.name: ua-scan-files.json
nodes.summary: Project scanner output cataloging 53 files in the BunnyChat repository with language and category breakdowns, plus aggregate complexity and filtering statistics for downstream analysis batches.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes byCategory and byLanguage stats covering 17 C# files, 7 CSHTML views, 7 CSS stylesheets, and supporting config and documentation.

nodes.name: C4_DIAGRAMS.md
nodes.summary: C4 model architecture diagrams for BunnyChat (BunnyChat) rendered as Mermaid flowcharts, covering system context, container, and component views with source-folder mapping.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Mermaid flowchart TD syntax for three C4 zoom levels with explicit mapping to BunnyChat source paths.

nodes.name: PROJECT_DOCUMENTATION.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive technical documentation for the BunnyChat BunnyChat ASP.NET Core 8 application, covering architecture, controllers, services, MongoDB schema, JWT auth, API endpoints, middleware, security, deployment, and sequence diagrams.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Minimal project readme with API design spreadsheet link, MongoDB connection notes, and dotnet build/run/clean commands for the BunnyChat project.

nodes.name: TECHNICAL_DOCUMENTATION.md
nodes.summary: Full technical reference for BunnyChat (BunnyChat) mirroring the project documentation scope: layered monolithic architecture, startup flow, request lifecycle, REST APIs, MongoDB collections, DI, JWT security, and Mermaid sequence diagrams.

nodes.name: DoAn_web.sln
nodes.summary: Visual Studio solution file that groups the BunnyChat ASP.NET Core project with Debug and Release build configurations across multiple CPU platforms.

nodes.name: BunnyChat.csproj
nodes.summary: SDK-style .NET 8 web project manifest declaring nullable C# settings and NuGet dependencies for JWT authentication, MongoDB, BCrypt hashing, and Swagger.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web with JWT Bearer, MongoDB.Driver, and Swashbuckle package references.

nodes.name: appsettings.Development.json
nodes.summary: Development-only ASP.NET Core configuration overlay tuning logging levels and Bearer authentication valid issuers and audiences for local hosts.

nodes.name: appsettings.json
nodes.summary: Primary application settings supplying MongoDB connection string, JWT issuer/audience and token lifetimes, default logging levels, and allowed hosts for the BunnyChat API.

nodes.name: Auth.css
nodes.summary: Styles the login and registration experience with a full-viewport video background, glassmorphism auth card, sliding login/signup panels, and form controls including floating labels and gradient buttons.
nodes.languageNotes: Imports AuthAnimation.css for motion; pairs with main.css in AuthLayout.

nodes.name: Chat.css
nodes.summary: ASP.NET-style site chrome for the chat area: navbar brand, primary buttons, nav pills, borders, box shadow, policy button, and fixed footer positioning.

nodes.name: Forgot.css
nodes.summary: Styles the password-recovery flow with a glassmorphism card, centered forgot form, inputs, and actions aligned with the Auth page visual language.

nodes.name: main.css
nodes.summary: Global baseline styles shared across layouts: border-box reset, responsive root font size, Bootstrap focus ring overrides, and body margin for a fixed footer.

nodes.name: theme.css
nodes.summary: Eric Meyer CSS reset followed by design-token definitions in :root for primary and neutral palettes, gradients, and a modular type scale used across the frontend.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines a third-party element reset with custom properties for brand colors and font sizing.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern configuration for the Understand-Anything scanner, excluding build artifacts like .vs/ and bin/ from codebase analysis.

nodes.name: scan-result.json
nodes.summary: Intermediate scanner output cataloging all project files, detected languages, frameworks, complexity estimates, and an empty import map for the BunnyChat codebase.

nodes.name: Authcontroller.cs
nodes.summary: REST API controller handling user registration, login with JWT and refresh-token cookies, and logout by clearing MongoDB sessions.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses BCrypt password hashing, MongoDB upsert for sessions, and HttpOnly refresh-token cookies.

nodes.name: AuthController
nodes.summary: ASP.NET Core API controller exposing /auth signup, login, and logout endpoints backed by MongoDB user and session collections.

nodes.name: SignUp
nodes.summary: Registers a new user after validating input, checking username/email uniqueness, hashing the password with BCrypt, and inserting into MongoDB.

nodes.name: Login
nodes.summary: Authenticates a user by username and password, issues JWT access and refresh tokens, persists the session in MongoDB, and sets an HttpOnly cookie.

nodes.name: LogOut
nodes.summary: Logs out the current user by deleting their refresh-token session from MongoDB and clearing the refresh-token cookie.

nodes.name: FriendController.cs
nodes.summary: Minimal API controller stub for listing friend records from the MongoDB friends collection.

nodes.name: FriendController
nodes.summary: Controller with a single GET endpoint that returns all documents from the friends MongoDB collection.

nodes.name: Get
nodes.summary: Returns all friend records from MongoDB as a list response.

nodes.name: UserController.cs
nodes.summary: User profile API controller supporting list, authenticated self-profile, profile updates, and username/email search against MongoDB.

nodes.name: UserController
nodes.summary: Controller managing user CRUD-style operations including profile retrieval, updates, and regex-based search with JWT claim extraction.

nodes.name: GetMe
nodes.summary: Returns the authenticated user's profile by reading the JWT name-identifier claim and loading the matching MongoDB user document.

nodes.name: UpdateInformation
nodes.summary: Updates the current user's profile fields after validating phone uniqueness and applying a MongoDB partial update.

nodes.name: Search
nodes.summary: Searches users by username regex and/or exact email using MongoDB filter composition and returns sanitized public profile data.

nodes.name: MongoDBService.cs
nodes.summary: Singleton MongoDB connection service that initializes the database client and sets up a TTL index on session refresh tokens.

nodes.name: MongoDbService
nodes.summary: Wraps MongoClient initialization from configuration and exposes the IMongoDatabase instance used across controllers.

nodes.name: DeleteDocumentForRefreshToken
nodes.summary: Creates a TTL index on session ExpiresAt so expired refresh-token documents are automatically removed by MongoDB.

nodes.name: Auth.cs
nodes.summary: Data transfer objects for authentication requests including SignUpDTORequest record and LoginDTORequest with validation attributes.

nodes.name: LoginDTORequest
nodes.summary: Login request payload carrying required username and password fields with data-annotation validation.

nodes.name: FriendDTO.cs
nodes.summary: DTO for friend-request payloads containing recipient ID and an optional message field.

nodes.name: FriendDTORequest
nodes.summary: Request model for sending a friend invitation with ReceiveId and Message properties.

nodes.name: UserDTO.cs
nodes.summary: DTO for user profile update requests covering bio, phone, nickname, name, and avatar URL fields.

nodes.name: UserInformationDTORequest
nodes.summary: Mutable profile update payload mapped to User entity fields during UpdateInformation.

nodes.name: authMiddleware.cs
nodes.summary: Fully commented-out custom JWT authentication middleware that would validate users and attach them to HttpContext.Items.
nodes.languageNotes: Entire AuthMiddleware implementation is commented out; JWT validation is handled elsewhere in Program.cs.

nodes.name: friends.cs
nodes.summary: MongoDB entity model for friend requests and relationships with sender, recipient, message, status, and timestamps.

nodes.name: Friend
nodes.summary: BSON-mapped friend document with ObjectId primary key, sender/receiver IDs, message, status enum, and audit timestamps.

nodes.name: session.cs
nodes.summary: MongoDB session entity storing user ID, username, refresh token, and expiration for JWT refresh-token rotation.

nodes.name: Session
nodes.summary: Refresh-token session document keyed by user ID with username, token value, and UTC expiration timestamp.

nodes.name: users.cs
nodes.summary: Core User MongoDB entity with identity, credentials, profile fields, and computed DisplayName property.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: Primary user document model with BSON Id mapping, hashed password, profile metadata, and a DisplayName computed property.

nodes.name: ErrorViewModel.cs
nodes.summary: Simple view model exposing RequestId and a ShowRequestId flag for ASP.NET Core error pages.

nodes.name: ErrorViewModel
nodes.summary: Carries the current request correlation ID for display on error views when available.

nodes.name: ITokenService.cs
nodes.summary: Interface contract for JWT access-token and cryptographically secure refresh-token generation.

nodes.name: ITokenService
nodes.summary: Defines CreateAccessToken and CreateRefreshToken methods implemented by TokenService for authentication flows.

nodes.name: TokenService.cs
nodes.summary: JWT token service that builds signed access tokens from user claims and generates random base64 refresh tokens.

nodes.name: TokenService
nodes.summary: Concrete ITokenService using HMAC-SHA256 signing credentials and RandomNumberGenerator for refresh tokens.

nodes.name: CreateAccessToken
nodes.summary: Builds a signed JWT access token embedding user ID, username, and email claims with configurable expiry.

nodes.name: CreateRefreshToken
nodes.summary: Generates a cryptographically random 64-byte refresh token encoded as base64.

nodes.name: ApiResponse.cs
nodes.summary: Static helper producing uniform JSON API response envelopes with success flag, message, and optional data payload.

nodes.name: ApiResponse
nodes.summary: Factory class with Success and Fail static methods used by all API controllers for consistent response shaping.

nodes.name: Success
nodes.summary: Returns an anonymous object with success=true, a message, and optional data for Ok responses.

nodes.name: Fail
nodes.summary: Returns an anonymous object with success=false and an error message for failed API responses.

nodes.name: Directory.Build.props
nodes.summary: MSBuild directory props file clearing RestoreFallbackFolders to control NuGet package restore behavior for the BunnyChat project tree.

nodes.name: PageController.cs
nodes.summary: MVC page controller routing the home, forgot-password, and chat views to their respective Razor templates.

nodes.name: PageController
nodes.summary: Serves Auth, Forgot, and Chat Razor views via explicit view paths on GET /, /Forgot, and /Chat routes.

nodes.name: Index
nodes.summary: Default GET action rendering the combined login/signup Auth.cshtml page.

nodes.name: Forgot
nodes.summary: GET /Forgot action rendering the password recovery Razor view.

nodes.name: Chat
nodes.summary: GET /Chat action rendering the chat interface Index.cshtml view.

nodes.name: _ViewImports.cshtml
nodes.summary: Global Razor view imports registering BunnyChat namespaces and ASP.NET Core tag helpers for all views.

nodes.name: Auth.cshtml
nodes.summary: Combined login and signup Razor page with animated card UI, forms posting to Auth controller, and links to forgot-password flow.

nodes.name: Forgot.cshtml
nodes.summary: Password recovery Razor page with username/email input form posting to Auth/Forgot and Bootstrap styling.

nodes.name: Index.cshtml
nodes.summary: Chat application shell view with sidebar navigation and main content area using the shared chat layout.

nodes.name: _ChatLayout.cshtml
nodes.summary: Shared Razor layout for chat pages loading main.css, Chat.css, Bootstrap, and a RenderBody content area.

nodes.name: _ValidationScriptsPartial.cshtml
nodes.summary: Partial view including jQuery Validation and unobtrusive validation scripts for client-side form validation.

nodes.name: Program.cs
nodes.summary: ASP.NET Core application entry point configuring MVC views, Swagger, MongoDB, JWT Bearer authentication, static files from Frontend/wwwroot, and default Page controller routing.
nodes.languageNotes: Registers MongoDbService, TokenService, JWT validation with custom 401/403 JSON responses, and custom Razor view locations under Frontend/Views.

nodes.name: AuthLayout.cshtml
nodes.summary: Shared Razor layout for authentication pages with Bootstrap, main/Auth CSS, background video, and scripts for rabbit animation and auth card toggling.

nodes.name: AuthAnimation.css
nodes.summary: CSS animations for the auth card switching transition between login and signup modes.

nodes.name: RabbitAnimation.css
nodes.summary: CSS styles for the interactive rabbit mascot animation on auth pages, including ear, eye, and hide states.

nodes.name: Auth.js
nodes.summary: Client-side script toggling the auth card between login and signup modes with CSS class transitions.

nodes.name: rabbit.js
nodes.summary: Client-side script controlling rabbit mascot eye tracking on mouse move and hiding the rabbit when password fields are focused.

nodes.name: site.js
nodes.summary: Minimal site-wide JavaScript placeholder for shared frontend behavior.

nodes.name: jquery.validate.unobtrusive.js
nodes.summary: Third-party jQuery Unobtrusive Validation library enabling ASP.NET MVC client-side form validation.

nodes.name: LICENSE.txt
nodes.summary: MIT license text for the jQuery Unobtrusive Validation library.

nodes.name: LICENSE.md
nodes.summary: MIT license text for the jQuery Validation plugin.

nodes.name: LICENSE.txt
nodes.summary: MIT license text for the jQuery library.

nodes.name: launchSettings.json
nodes.summary: Development launch profiles defining localhost URLs (5281/7230), IIS Express settings, and ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development.

layers.name: Application Core
layers.description: Application bootstrap, hosting pipeline, and cross-cutting startup configuration.

layers.name: Backend API
layers.description: REST controllers, DTOs, MongoDB data access, JWT token services, middleware, and domain entities.

layers.name: Frontend Presentation
layers.description: MVC views, Razor layouts, static CSS/JS assets, and client-side auth UI behavior.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Project manifests, appsettings, launch profiles, and environment-specific settings.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project README, technical docs, architecture diagrams, and third-party license files.

layers.name: Analysis Tooling
layers.description: Understand-Anything pipeline artifacts generated during codebase analysis.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and technical documentation to understand BunnyChat as an ASP.NET Core 8 chat application with JWT and MongoDB.

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: Program.cs wires up MVC, Swagger, MongoDB, JWT authentication, static files, and default Page routing.

tour.title: Authentication API
tour.description: AuthController handles signup, login, and logout using BCrypt, MongoDB sessions, and JWT access/refresh tokens.

tour.title: User & Friend APIs
tour.description: UserController manages profiles and search; FriendController handles friend request workflows.

tour.title: Data Layer
tour.description: MongoDbService connects to the chatapp database; entity models define users, sessions, and friends collections.

tour.title: Frontend Pages
tour.description: PageController serves Auth, Forgot, and Chat views; AuthLayout provides the BunnyChat branded UI shell.

tour.title: Client-Side Auth UX
tour.description: Auth.js toggles login/signup cards; rabbit.js adds playful password-field interactions.
